home.eyebrow: ◆ AI Revenue & Intelligence Layer for E-Commerce
home.subtitle: Vitrin adds Persian hybrid search, a grounded shopping assistant, and a business-insight engine to OpenCart & WooCommerce — on-premise, multi-tenant, and cost-controlled.

features.heading: Not a chat widget. A revenue layer.
features.subheading: Three AI roles in one system: sales assistant, business analyst, and insight engine.

items.title: Persian hybrid search
items.body: BM25 + dense vectors fused with RRF, ZWNJ-aware analysis and synonyms — search that actually understands Farsi.

items.title: Grounded shopping assistant
items.body: A RAG assistant that answers only from the store's own catalogue — no hallucinated products, with streaming replies.

items.title: AI business analyst
items.body: Ask 'why did sales drop?' in plain language and get grounded answers from your real store data.

items.title: Customer insight engine
items.body: Demand gaps, zero-result mining, lead capture and AI-attributed revenue — turn search into growth.

items.title: Cost-controlled AI
items.body: A local-first gateway (cache → route → compress) keeps most traffic off paid APIs with credit-based billing.

items.title: Secure multi-tenancy
items.body: Hard tenant isolation, scoped API keys, audit logging and GDPR controls — built for on-premise.

heroVisual.chatBot: Found three in-stock models that fit your budget — all from your own catalogue.

items.q: Does our data stay on our servers?
items.a: Yes. Vitrin is on-premise; your catalogue and customer data never leave your environment.

items.q: Does it work with WooCommerce and OpenCart?
items.a: Yes — ready-made plugins, plus REST/webhook APIs for custom platforms.
Usage-based credits. A free plan to start, and upgrades as your store grows.

items.q: Does it depend on a paid API?
items.a: No. The local-first architecture serves 85%+ of traffic from in-house models and cache.
No. Answers are grounded in your synced catalogue and nothing outside it.
Connection and initial indexing usually complete the same day.

features.title: Everything your store needs to get intelligent
features.subtitle: Search, assistant, and analytics — one on-premise platform.

sections.title: Persian hybrid search
points: BM25 keyword + dense-vector semantic search fused with RRF.
ZWNJ normalization, a Persian analyzer, and editable synonyms.
Sub-150ms p95 latency with DiskBBQ vector compression.

sections.title: Grounded shopping assistant
points: RAG over your own catalogue — never invents products.
Streaming replies with prompt-injection guardrails.
Multilingual: Persian, English, German, Arabic.

sections.title: Business analyst & insight engine
points: Ask 'why did sales drop?' in natural language.
Most-wanted, zero-result mining, and demand-gap discovery.
Lead capture, intent detection, and AI-attributed revenue.

sections.title: Secure, on-premise multi-tenancy
points: Hard tenant isolation enforced on every query.
Scoped least-privilege API keys + full audit log.
GDPR controls: export, erase, and tracking toggles.

sections.title: Cost-controlled AI gateway
points: Cache → route → compress ladder keeps traffic off paid APIs.
Credit-based billing with per-model multipliers.
Multi-provider failover ending at a local model.

sections.title: Drop-in integrations
points: OpenCart module + WooCommerce plugin.
Event-driven incremental sync — only deltas are sent.
Custom REST / webhook / bulk-import APIs.

sections.title: Getting started
items: Create an account and verify your email.
Open your dashboard → create a sync-scoped API key.
Connect your store (WooCommerce / OpenCart) and run the first import.
Add a widget-scoped key and embed the search + chat widget.

sections.title: API surface
items: All /v1 calls authenticate with an x-api-key and are tenant-scoped.

sections.title: Widget
items: Embed the loader snippet before </body> with your widget key.
Customize logo and accent color under Widget & brand.
The widget calls /v1/search and /v1/chat on the shopper's behalf.

sections.title: Security & data
items: Hard tenant isolation: every query carries a mandatory tenant filter.
Scoped least-privilege API keys; only hashes are stored.
GDPR: export, erase, and disable tracking from dashboard settings.

sections.heading: 1. Agreement
sections.body: These Terms govern your access to and use of the Vitrin platform ("Service"). By creating an account or using the Service you agree to these Terms. If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you accept these Terms for that organization.

sections.heading: 2. Accounts
sections.body: You are responsible for safeguarding your credentials and for all activity under your account. Notify us promptly of any unauthorized use. You must provide accurate information and verify your email address.

sections.heading: 3. Plans & billing
sections.body: Paid plans are billed per the pricing shown at checkout. Credits and quotas reset each billing period. Manual/invoice payments activate access on confirmation. Fees are non-refundable except where required by law.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable use
sections.body: You may not use the Service to violate any law, infringe rights, transmit malware, or attempt to breach tenant isolation or access data that is not yours.

sections.heading: 5. Data & tenancy
sections.body: Each store is an isolated tenant. You retain ownership of your catalogue and customer data. We process it solely to provide the Service, per our Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 6. Availability & changes
sections.body: We aim for high availability but the Service is provided "as is". We may update features and these Terms; material changes will be communicated.

sections.heading: 7. Termination
sections.body: You may cancel at any time. We may suspend accounts that violate these Terms. On termination you may export your data for a reasonable period.

sections.heading: 1. Who we are
sections.body: Vitrin is an on-premise, multi-tenant AI commerce intelligence platform. This policy explains what we process and your rights. For self-hosted deployments, the store operator is the data controller.

sections.heading: 2. What we process
sections.body: Account data (name, email, hashed password), tenant/store settings, catalogue data you sync, search and chat events, and in-conversation leads. Passwords are stored only as salted PBKDF2 hashes; API keys only as hashes.

sections.heading: 3. How we use it
sections.body: To provide search, the assistant, analytics, and billing; to secure the Service; and to communicate essential account notices (verification, password resets, invoices).

sections.heading: 4. Tenant isolation
sections.body: Every query is scoped to your tenant. Data is never shared across tenants. Access is governed by scoped least-privilege API keys and role-based controls.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights (GDPR)
sections.body: You can export your tenant's data, disable behavioural tracking, and request erasure from your dashboard settings or via support. We honor access, rectification, and deletion requests.

sections.heading: 6. Retention
sections.body: We retain data for the life of your account and a limited period afterward for legal and operational needs, then erase or anonymize it.

sections.heading: 7. Sub-processors & AI
sections.body: The platform is local-first: most traffic is served by self-hosted models and cache. Any external AI provider is used only as a fallback and receives the minimum necessary context.
